interaction_target: What are you thinking right now? text area

description: The browser navigates to the Google homepage.

description: Veronika selects the 'skyscanner' suggestion from the dropdown list.

description: The page navigates to the Google search results for 'skyscanner'.

description: Veronika clicks on the Skyscanner link to visit the website.

description: A loading spinner is displayed while the Skyscanner website loads.

description: Veronika returns to the task prompt and types a long, detailed response about her travel planning considerations.
interaction_target: What are you thinking right now? text area

description: The Skyscanner homepage finishes loading and is displayed to the user.
